description: You are a Medical Scientist / Clinical Data Manager overseeing the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Correct the disposition errors in OpenClinica (username 'root', password 'Admin123!') for the Phase II Diabetes Trial by removing subjects DM-102 (failed screening HbA1c) and DM-105 (withdrew informed consent), and restoring subject DM-104 to active status. Do not modify the status of any other subjects, including DM-101 and DM-103.
